goal: Equivalent governance outcomes across Claude Code, Copilot, and Codex

codex: PermissionRequest is Codex-native and must be mapped or waived
copilot: PreCompact and SubagentStart are currently wired
claude-code: Claude Code supports hooks through settings.json
cursor: Phase 1 (#3085) + Phase 2 (#3086) COMPLETE — all 12 #1912 surfaces parity-complete or documented-waiver. Hooks: .cursor/hooks.json (scripts/global/cursor-hooks-emit.js) wires all 9 requiredHookScripts incl. the ticket-lifecycle gates (manager_ticket_gate/goal_lens on beforeSubmitPrompt, commit_ticket_gate on preToolUse/beforeShellExecution). HAMR: HAMR_TEAM=cursor across provider-wrapper/activation-check/activate.sh. Agents: agents/ deployed to ~/.cursor/agents/ + subagentStart/subagentStop hooks. visual_qa: governance gate is runtime-agnostic (pretool_guard git-tag block + stop_checks, deployed to ~/.cursor/hooks) and the playwright-vision-low-resource skill reaches Cursor via ~/.agents/skills — Playwright MCP itself is operator-configured identically across all runtimes (none auto-register it). wiki: cross-runtime read of ~/.copilot/wiki/ (mirror claude-code).

Cursor hook events are camelCase (sessionStart/beforeSubmitPrompt/preToolUse/stop) plus natives subagentStart/subagentStop/beforeShellExecution/beforeMCPExecution/afterFileEdit; the adapter maps each onto the harness PascalCase taxonomy (SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop)
antigravity: Injection: User Rules system-prompt XML + Knowledge Items (KI); @-import not supported
Phase-2 waiver: visual-qa (Playwright MCP) — Antigravity Playwright integration TBD
Phase-2 waiver: dedicated wiki path — reads from ~/.copilot/wiki/ (cross-runtime-read pattern)
Phase-1 gate: hooks.json + HAMR substrate (#3104, #3106) required before hook parity verified

strictAcceptance.hooks: Every supported runtime has equivalent gate outcomes
strictAcceptance.deploy: Operators can deploy one, any pair, or all three runtimes clearly
strictAcceptance.skills: Every canonical skill has an adapter or explicit waiver per runtime
strictAcceptance.tests: Parity checks inspect registrations, not only copied script bytes

wikiDocsParity.ingestionContract: Megingjord-only (npm run wiki:ingest); ingest-only artifacts (sources/, syntheses/, lint.js) deployed to Copilot wiki only; downstream runtimes read deployed artifacts

codex.notes: sources/ and syntheses/ are ingest-only; not deployed to Codex

claude-code.notes: Reads from ~/.copilot/wiki/ via wiki-knowledge.instructions.md; search command is node ~/.copilot/scripts/wiki-search.js

cursor.notes: Phase 2 (#3086): reads from ~/.copilot/wiki/ via wiki-knowledge.instructions.md (runtime-agnostic 'Any repo' access); search command is node ~/.copilot/scripts/wiki-search.js (mirror claude-code)

antigravity.note: Reads from ~/.copilot/wiki/; wiki-knowledge.instructions.md injected via KI (not @-import)

parityGaps: claude-code has no dedicated wiki home — reads Copilot runtime by design
codex wiki missing sources/ and syntheses/ (ingest-only artifacts; expected)
cursor has no dedicated wiki home — reads Copilot runtime by design (#3086, mirror claude-code)
